form.label: CAO & DAR Platform Application Support — Hybrid OCP & VM Incident & Log Center v6.5
form.description: Production incident investigation across OCP applications and VM-hosted services. v6.5 retains all OCP projects and adds a Lenel OpenAccess VM example using index=lenel and sourcetype=wf:lenel:openaccess:txt.

init.set: No error selected — click an error-evidence row to open its surrounding logs

change.set: No error selected — click an error-evidence row

div.span: Active application: $selected_project_label$ | Platform: $platform_type$ | Project / scope: $project_namespace$ | Splunk index: $selected_index$ | Sourcetype: $selected_sourcetype$

60-second workflow: select an OCP or VM application → choose time and data center → read “What Is Wrong Now?” → click the latest matching error → review its context → follow the suggested check → export evidence → resolve or escalate.

search.query: index="$selected_index$" sourcetype="$selected_sourcetype$" | fields _time _raw host hostname source sourcetype message body level severity severityText applicationName app namespace project pod_name container_name datacenter dc site URL url uri request_uri endpoint requestUrl requestURL method HttpMethod httpMethod requestMethod status status_code statusCode http_status httpStatus respStatus responseStatus responseCode response_code kubernetes | addinfo | spath | eval source_project=coalesce('kubernetes.namespace_name','kubernetes.namespace',namespace,project) | where "$platform_type$"="VM" OR source_project="$project_namespace$" | eval application=coalesce('message.applicationName',applicationName,app,'kubernetes.labels.app','kubernetes.labels.app_kubernetes_io/name','kubernetes.container_name','kubernetes.container',"$selected_project_label$") | eval pod=coalesce('kubernetes.pod_name','kubernetes.pod',pod_name,hostname,host,"Unknown") | eval container=coalesce('kubernetes.container_name','kubernetes.container',container_name,"Unknown") | eval node=coalesce('kubernetes.node_name','kubernetes.host',host,hostname,"Unknown") | eval raw_dc=upper(coalesce(datacenter,dc,site,'kubernetes.labels.datacenter','kubernetes.labels.dc',node,pod,host,hostname)) | eval datacenter=case(match(raw_dc,"GAR04P|(^|[-_])GAR([-_]|$)"),"GAR",match(raw_dc,"MAN04P|(^|[-_])MAN([-_]|$)"),"MAN",match(raw_dc,"STR04P|(^|[-_])STR([-_]|$)"),"STR",match(raw_dc,"LEW04P|(^|[-_])LEW([-_]|$)"),"LEW",true(),"UNKNOWN") | eval log_level=upper(coalesce('message.level',level,severity,severityText,"UNKNOWN")) | eval log_level=case(match(log_level,"ERR|FATAL|SEVERE"),"ERROR",match(log_level,"WARN"),"WARN",match(log_level,"INFO"),"INFO",match(log_level,"DEBUG|TRACE"),"DEBUG",true(),log_level) | eval log_text=coalesce('message.body',body,message,_raw) | eval endpoint_candidate=coalesce('message.URL','message.url','message.uri','message.request_uri','message.endpoint','message.requestUrl','message.requestURL',URL,url,uri,request_uri,endpoint,requestUrl,requestURL) | eval method_candidate=coalesce('message.HttpMethod','message.httpMethod','message.method','message.requestMethod',HttpMethod,httpMethod,method,requestMethod) | eval status_candidate=coalesce('message.http_status','message.httpStatus','message.status','message.status_code','message.statusCode','message.respStatus','message.responseStatus','message.responseCode','message.response_code',http_status,httpStatus,status,status_code,statusCode,respStatus,responseStatus,responseCode,response_code) | rex field=status_candidate max_match=1 "(?<status_from_structured>[1-5][0-9]{2})" | rex field=log_text max_match=1 "(?i)(?:resp(?:onse)?[_ -]?status|http[_ -]?status|status(?:Code)?|response(?:Code)?|httpStatus|HTTP(?:/[0-9.]+)?)[^0-9]{0,40}(?<status_from_text>[1-5][0-9]{2})" | rex field=log_text max_match=1 "(?i)(?:HttpClientErrorException|HttpServerErrorException|WebClientResponseException|unauthorized|forbidden|bad request|not found|too many requests|internal server error|bad gateway|service unavailable|gateway timeout)[^0-9]{0,80}(?<status_from_exception>400|401|403|404|405|408|409|415|422|429|500|501|502|503|504)" | rex field=log_text max_match=1 "(?i)\b(?<status_before_label>400|401|403|404|405|408|409|415|422|429|500|501|502|503|504)\b[^A-Za-z]{0,20}(?:bad request|unauthorized|forbidden|not found|method not allowed|request timeout|conflict|unsupported media type|unprocessable entity|too many requests|internal server error|not implemented|bad gateway|service unavailable|gateway timeout)" | rex field=log_text max_match=1 "(?i)\b(?<method_from_text>GET|POST|PUT|PATCH|DELETE|HEAD|OPTIONS)\b(?:\s+request\s+(?:for|to)|\s+)?\s*[\"']?(?<endpoint_from_text>https?://[^\s\"']+|/[^\s\"']+)" | eval endpoint=coalesce(endpoint_candidate,endpoint_from_text,"Not available") | eval http_method=upper(coalesce(method_candidate,method_from_text,"UNKNOWN")) | eval http_status=tostring(coalesce(status_from_structured,status_from_text,status_from_exception,status_before_label)) | eval http_status=if(match(http_status,"^[1-5][0-9]{2}$"),http_status,null()) | eval is_http_event=if(isnotnull(http_status),1,0) | eval is_http_200=if(http_status="200",1,0) | eval is_http_success=if(tonumber(http_status)>=200 AND tonumber(http_status)<300,1,0) | eval is_http_4xx=if(tonumber(http_status)>=400 AND tonumber(http_status)<500,1,0) | eval is_http_5xx=if(tonumber(http_status)>=500 AND tonumber(http_status)<600,1,0) | eval is_rest_api_error=if(match(log_text,"(?i)REST_API_CALL_ERROR|HttpServerErrorException|HttpClientErrorException|WebClientResponseException") OR is_http_4xx=1 OR is_http_5xx=1,1,0) | eval is_database_error=if(match(log_text,"(?i)SQLServerException|SQLException|deadlock|JDBC|connection pool exhausted|database connection"),1,0) | eval is_batch_error=if(match(log_text,"(?i)afterJob|beforeJob|JobExecution|StepExecution|status=FAILED|exitStatus=FAILED") AND match(log_text,"(?i)FAILED|Exception encountered|rollback"),1,0) | eval is_rollback_error=if(match(log_text,"(?i)rollback|TransactionRollbackException|UnexpectedRollbackException"),1,0) | eval is_timeout=if(match(log_text,"(?i)timeout|timed out|SocketTimeout|ReadTimeout|ConnectTimeout"),1,0) | eval is_auth_error=if(http_status="401" OR http_status="403" OR match(log_text,"(?i)authentication failed|authorization failed|unauthorized|forbidden|invalid token|expired token"),1,0) | eval is_platform_error=if(match(log_text,"(?i)OOMKilled|OutOfMemoryError|out of memory|CrashLoopBackOff|ImagePullBackOff|ErrImagePull|Evicted"),1,0) | eval is_connection_error=if(match(log_text,"(?i)connection refused|connection reset|no route to host|broken pipe|Service Unavailable"),1,0) | eval is_messaging_error=if(match(log_text,"(?i)consumer exception|deserializ|serialization exception|kafka exception|rabbitmq|message broker"),1,0) | eval is_actionable_error=if(is_rest_api_error=1 OR is_database_error=1 OR is_batch_error=1 OR is_rollback_error=1 OR is_timeout=1 OR is_auth_error=1 OR is_platform_error=1 OR is_connection_error=1 OR is_messaging_error=1 OR log_level="ERROR",1,0) | eval event_category=case(is_platform_error=1,"Pod / Platform Error",is_rollback_error=1,"Transaction Rollback",is_batch_error=1,"Batch Failure",is_database_error=1,"Database Error",is_timeout=1,"Timeout",is_auth_error=1,"Authentication Error",is_connection_error=1,"Connection Error",is_messaging_error=1,"Messaging / Deserialization Error",is_rest_api_error=1,"REST API Error",log_level="ERROR","Application Error",true(),"Normal") | eval status_family=case(is_http_success=1,"2xx",tonumber(http_status)>=300 AND tonumber(http_status)<400,"3xx",is_http_4xx=1,"4xx",is_http_5xx=1,"5xx",true(),"No Status") | eval app_filter=lower($search_filter|s$), pod_filter_value=lower($pod_filter|s$) | where ($datacenter|s$="*" OR datacenter=$datacenter|s$) AND ($severity|s$="*" OR log_level=$severity|s$) AND (app_filter="*" OR app_filter="" OR like(lower(application),"%".app_filter."%")) AND (pod_filter_value="*" OR pod_filter_value="" OR like(lower(pod),"%".pod_filter_value."%")) | eval http_status=coalesce(http_status,"N/A"), event_time=_time | bin _time span=1m | stats count AS Events sum(is_actionable_error) AS Error_Events sum(is_http_event) AS HTTP_Events sum(is_http_200) AS HTTP_200 sum(is_http_success) AS HTTP_Success sum(is_http_4xx) AS HTTP_4xx sum(is_http_5xx) AS HTTP_5xx sum(is_rest_api_error) AS REST_Errors sum(is_database_error) AS DB_Errors sum(is_batch_error) AS Batch_Errors sum(is_rollback_error) AS Rollback_Errors sum(is_timeout) AS Timeout_Errors sum(is_auth_error) AS Auth_Errors sum(is_platform_error) AS Platform_Errors sum(is_connection_error) AS Connection_Errors sum(is_messaging_error) AS Messaging_Errors latest(event_time) AS Last_Seen max(info_max_time) AS Search_End by _time datacenter application pod container node endpoint http_method http_status status_family event_category | eval Search_End=if(Search_End>now(),now(),Search_End), HTTP_Failures=HTTP_Events-HTTP_Success

index="$selected_index$" sourcetype="$selected_sourcetype$" | fields _time _raw host hostname source sourcetype message body level severity severityText applicationName app namespace project pod_name container_name datacenter dc site URL url uri request_uri endpoint requestUrl requestURL method HttpMethod httpMethod requestMethod status status_code statusCode http_status httpStatus respStatus responseStatus responseCode response_code correlationId correlation_id traceId trace_id requestId request_id transactionId transaction_id kubernetes | spath | eval source_project=coalesce('kubernetes.namespace_name','kubernetes.namespace',namespace,project) | where "$platform_type$"="VM" OR source_project="$project_namespace$" | eval application=coalesce('message.applicationName',applicationName,app,'kubernetes.labels.app','kubernetes.labels.app_kubernetes_io/name','kubernetes.container_name','kubernetes.container',"$selected_project_label$") | eval pod=coalesce('kubernetes.pod_name','kubernetes.pod',pod_name,hostname,host,"Unknown") | eval container=coalesce('kubernetes.container_name','kubernetes.container',container_name,"Unknown") | eval node=coalesce('kubernetes.node_name','kubernetes.host',host,hostname,"Unknown") | eval raw_dc=upper(coalesce(datacenter,dc,site,'kubernetes.labels.datacenter','kubernetes.labels.dc',node,pod,host,hostname)) | eval datacenter=case(match(raw_dc,"GAR04P|(^|[-_])GAR([-_]|$)"),"GAR",match(raw_dc,"MAN04P|(^|[-_])MAN([-_]|$)"),"MAN",match(raw_dc,"STR04P|(^|[-_])STR([-_]|$)"),"STR",match(raw_dc,"LEW04P|(^|[-_])LEW([-_]|$)"),"LEW",true(),"UNKNOWN") | eval log_level=upper(coalesce('message.level',level,severity,severityText,"UNKNOWN")) | eval log_level=case(match(log_level,"ERR|FATAL|SEVERE"),"ERROR",match(log_level,"WARN"),"WARN",match(log_level,"INFO"),"INFO",match(log_level,"DEBUG|TRACE"),"DEBUG",true(),log_level) | eval log_text=coalesce('message.body',body,message,_raw) | eval correlation_id=coalesce('message.correlationId','message.correlation_id','message.traceId','message.trace_id','message.requestId','message.request_id','message.transactionId','message.transaction_id',correlationId,correlation_id,traceId,trace_id,requestId,request_id,transactionId,transaction_id) | rex field=log_text max_match=1 "(?i)(?:correlation[_ -]?id|trace[_ -]?id|request[_ -]?id|transaction[_ -]?id)\s*[:=]\s*[\"']?(?<correlation_from_text>[A-Za-z0-9._:-]{6,128})" | eval correlation_id=coalesce(correlation_id,correlation_from_text,"Not available") | eval endpoint_candidate=coalesce('message.URL','message.url','message.uri','message.request_uri','message.endpoint','message.requestUrl','message.requestURL',URL,url,uri,request_uri,endpoint,requestUrl,requestURL) | eval method_candidate=coalesce('message.HttpMethod','message.httpMethod','message.method','message.requestMethod',HttpMethod,httpMethod,method,requestMethod) | eval status_candidate=coalesce('message.http_status','message.httpStatus','message.status','message.status_code','message.statusCode','message.respStatus','message.responseStatus','message.responseCode','message.response_code',http_status,httpStatus,status,status_code,statusCode,respStatus,responseStatus,responseCode,response_code) | rex field=status_candidate max_match=1 "(?<status_from_structured>[1-5][0-9]{2})" | rex field=log_text max_match=1 "(?i)(?:resp(?:onse)?[_ -]?status|http[_ -]?status|status(?:Code)?|response(?:Code)?|httpStatus|HTTP(?:/[0-9.]+)?)[^0-9]{0,40}(?<status_from_text>[1-5][0-9]{2})" | rex field=log_text max_match=1 "(?i)(?:HttpClientErrorException|HttpServerErrorException|WebClientResponseException|unauthorized|forbidden|bad request|not found|too many requests|internal server error|bad gateway|service unavailable|gateway timeout)[^0-9]{0,80}(?<status_from_exception>400|401|403|404|405|408|409|415|422|429|500|501|502|503|504)" | rex field=log_text max_match=1 "(?i)\b(?<status_before_label>400|401|403|404|405|408|409|415|422|429|500|501|502|503|504)\b[^A-Za-z]{0,20}(?:bad request|unauthorized|forbidden|not found|method not allowed|request timeout|conflict|unsupported media type|unprocessable entity|too many requests|internal server error|not implemented|bad gateway|service unavailable|gateway timeout)" | rex field=log_text max_match=1 "(?i)\b(?<method_from_text>GET|POST|PUT|PATCH|DELETE|HEAD|OPTIONS)\b(?:\s+request\s+(?:for|to)|\s+)?\s*[\"']?(?<endpoint_from_text>https?://[^\s\"']+|/[^\s\"']+)" | eval endpoint=coalesce(endpoint_candidate,endpoint_from_text,"Not available"), http_method=upper(coalesce(method_candidate,method_from_text,"UNKNOWN")), http_status=tostring(coalesce(status_from_structured,status_from_text,status_from_exception,status_before_label,"N/A")) | eval event_category=case(match(log_text,"(?i)OOMKilled|OutOfMemoryError|out of memory|CrashLoopBackOff|ImagePullBackOff|ErrImagePull|Evicted"),"Pod / Platform Error",match(log_text,"(?i)rollback|TransactionRollbackException|UnexpectedRollbackException"),"Transaction Rollback",match(log_text,"(?i)afterJob|beforeJob|JobExecution|StepExecution|status=FAILED|exitStatus=FAILED") AND match(log_text,"(?i)FAILED|Exception encountered|rollback"),"Batch Failure",match(log_text,"(?i)SQLServerException|SQLException|deadlock|JDBC|connection pool exhausted|database connection"),"Database Error",match(log_text,"(?i)timeout|timed out|SocketTimeout|ReadTimeout|ConnectTimeout"),"Timeout",http_status="401" OR http_status="403" OR match(log_text,"(?i)authentication failed|authorization failed|unauthorized|forbidden|invalid token|expired token"),"Authentication Error",match(log_text,"(?i)connection refused|connection reset|no route to host|broken pipe|Service Unavailable"),"Connection Error",match(log_text,"(?i)consumer exception|deserializ|serialization exception|kafka exception|rabbitmq|message broker"),"Messaging / Deserialization Error",tonumber(http_status)>=400 OR match(log_text,"(?i)REST_API_CALL_ERROR|HttpServerErrorException|HttpClientErrorException|WebClientResponseException"),"REST API Error",log_level="ERROR","Application Error",log_level="WARN","Warning",true(),"Normal") | eval log_text=replace(log_text,"(?i)Bearer\s+[A-Za-z0-9._~+/-]+=*","Bearer [REDACTED]") | eval log_text=replace(log_text,"(?i)Basic\s+[A-Za-z0-9+/=]+","Basic [REDACTED]") | eval log_text=replace(log_text,"(?i)(?:password|passwd|pwd|client[_-]?secret|api[_-]?key|access[_-]?token|refresh[_-]?token)\s*[:=]\s*[^\s,;\"']+","[SENSITIVE_FIELD_REDACTED]") | eval app_filter=lower($search_filter|s$), pod_filter_value=lower($pod_filter|s$) | where ($datacenter|s$="*" OR datacenter=$datacenter|s$) AND ($severity|s$="*" OR log_level=$severity|s$) AND (app_filter="*" OR app_filter="" OR like(lower(application),"%".app_filter."%")) AND (pod_filter_value="*" OR pod_filter_value="" OR like(lower(pod),"%".pod_filter_value."%")) | eval evidence_group=coalesce(http_status,"N/A")."::".event_category | streamstats count AS evidence_rank BY evidence_group | where evidence_rank<=500 | fields _time datacenter application pod container node log_level http_status event_category http_method endpoint correlation_id log_text source

div.div:
1. Confirm scope
Select the application or VM service, then choose the time and data center. For a long search, enter an application, pod or host first.

2. Read the assessment
The next panel explains the active problem, impact and first recommended check.

3. Click the failure
Click an error row or KPI to open the exact evidence and five minutes of surrounding pod logs.

4. Decide and export
Resolve with the approved runbook or export redacted CSV evidence for Dev escalation.
div.p: HEALTHYNo actionable failures found. WARNINGClient, authentication or recoverable application issue. CRITICALServer, database, connection or platform impact.
Security: bearer/basic credentials, passwords, secrets, API keys and access/refresh tokens are masked in evidence tables and CSV exports generated from this dashboard.

table.title: What Is Wrong Now? — Plain-Language Incident Assessment

search.query: | where Error_Events>0 | eventstats sum(Error_Events) AS Total_Errors sum(HTTP_4xx) AS Total_4xx sum(HTTP_5xx) AS Total_5xx sum(DB_Errors) AS Total_DB sum(Connection_Errors) AS Total_Connection sum(Platform_Errors) AS Total_Platform dc(application) AS Affected_Applications dc(pod) AS Affected_Workloads_or_Hosts dc(datacenter) AS Affected_Data_Centers min(_time) AS First_Seen max(Last_Seen) AS Last_Seen | sort 0 - Error_Events | head 1 | eval Overall_State=case(Total_5xx>0 OR Total_DB>0 OR Total_Connection>0 OR Total_Platform>0,"CRITICAL",Total_Errors>0,"WARNING",true(),"HEALTHY") | eval Primary_Issue=event_category, Primary_HTTP=if(http_status="N/A","No HTTP response code","HTTP ".http_status) | eval Assessment=Total_Errors." actionable errors affect ".Affected_Applications." application(s), ".Affected_Workloads_or_Hosts." workload(s) or host(s), and ".Affected_Data_Centers." data center(s). Highest-volume issue: ".Primary_Issue." — ".Primary_HTTP."." | eval First_Check=case(http_status="401","Validate or refresh the token and credentials",http_status="403","Validate roles, permissions and access policy",http_status="404","Validate the endpoint, route and deployed version",http_status="409","Check duplicate data, idempotency and current record state",http_status="429","Check throttling, rate limits and retry behavior",tonumber(http_status)>=500,"Inspect the application stack trace and upstream dependency health",Primary_Issue="Database Error","Check database availability, pool usage and recent maintenance",Primary_Issue="Connection Error","Check network path and dependency availability",Primary_Issue="Timeout","Check backend latency and timeout settings",Primary_Issue="Batch Failure","Check the job/step failure and rollback timestamp",true(),"Open the latest error and inspect the surrounding pod logs") | eval Evidence_Quality=case(http_status="N/A" AND endpoint="Not available","PARTIAL — response code and endpoint missing",http_status="N/A","PARTIAL — response code missing",endpoint="Not available","PARTIAL — endpoint missing",true(),"GOOD") | eval Duration_Minutes=round((Last_Seen-First_Seen)/60,1) | convert ctime(First_Seen) ctime(Last_Seen) | fields Overall_State Assessment First_Check Evidence_Quality Total_Errors Total_4xx Total_5xx Affected_Applications Affected_Workloads_or_Hosts Affected_Data_Centers First_Seen Last_Seen Duration_Minutes | appendpipe [ stats count | where count=0 | eval Overall_State="HEALTHY", Assessment="No actionable errors were found for the selected scope and time range. Confirm the log-freshness panel before concluding the application is healthy.", First_Check="Verify that logs are current and that the intended application/data center filters are selected.", Evidence_Quality="CHECK LOG FRESHNESS", Total_Errors=0, Total_4xx=0, Total_5xx=0, Affected_Applications=0, Affected_Workloads_or_Hosts=0, Affected_Data_Centers=0, First_Seen="N/A", Last_Seen="N/A", Duration_Minutes=0 | fields - count ]

format.colorPalette: {"GOOD":"#53A051","CHECK LOG FRESHNESS":"#F8BE34","PARTIAL — response code missing":"#F8BE34","PARTIAL — endpoint missing":"#F8BE34","PARTIAL — response code and endpoint missing":"#F1813F"}

table.title: Is the Incident Getting Better or Worse? — Latest 15 Minutes Compared With the Previous 15 Minutes

search.query: | timechart span=15m sum(Error_Events) AS Errors | tail 2 | stats first(Errors) AS Previous_15m last(Errors) AS Current_15m | eval Change_Percent=case(isnull(Current_15m),null(),Previous_15m=0 AND Current_15m>0,100,Previous_15m=0,0,true(),round(((Current_15m-Previous_15m)/Previous_15m)*100,1)) | eval Direction=case(isnull(Current_15m),"NO DATA",Current_15m=0 AND Previous_15m=0,"NO ACTIVE ERRORS",Previous_15m=0 AND Current_15m>0,"NEW ACTIVITY",Current_15m>Previous_15m*1.2,"INCREASING",Current_15m<Previous_15m*0.8,"RECOVERING",true(),"STABLE") | eval Meaning=case(Direction="NO DATA","Check the log-freshness panel before making a decision",Direction="NO ACTIVE ERRORS","No actionable errors in either comparison window",Direction="NEW ACTIVITY","Errors started in the latest 15-minute window",Direction="INCREASING","Impact is growing; prioritize investigation and escalation readiness",Direction="RECOVERING","Error volume is declining; confirm recovery in surrounding logs",true(),"Error volume is not changing materially") | eval Previous_15m=coalesce(Previous_15m,0), Current_15m=coalesce(Current_15m,0), Change_Percent=coalesce(Change_Percent,0) | fields Direction Current_15m Previous_15m Change_Percent Meaning

table.title: Log Freshness and Coverage — “No Errors” Is Not the Same as “No Logs”

search.query: | stats sum(Events) AS Events dc(pod) AS Reporting_Workloads_or_Hosts max(Last_Seen) AS Last_Seen max(Search_End) AS Search_End by datacenter application | eval Minutes_Since_Last_Log=round((Search_End-Last_Seen)/60,1) | eval Freshness=case(Minutes_Since_Last_Log<=5,"CURRENT",Minutes_Since_Last_Log<=15,"DELAYED",true(),"STALE") | eval Freshness_Rank=case(Freshness="STALE",1,Freshness="DELAYED",2,true(),3) | eval Meaning=case(Freshness="CURRENT","Logs are arriving normally",Freshness="DELAYED","Logs are arriving late; verify ingestion before making a health decision",true(),"No recent logs near the selected range end; investigate logging or application activity") | convert ctime(Last_Seen) | sort 0 Freshness_Rank - Minutes_Since_Last_Log | fields Freshness datacenter application Reporting_Workloads_or_Hosts Events Minutes_Since_Last_Log Last_Seen Meaning | head 50 | appendpipe [ stats count | where count=0 | eval Freshness="NO DATA", datacenter="N/A", application="$selected_project_label$", Reporting_Workloads_or_Hosts=0, Events=0, Minutes_Since_Last_Log="N/A", Last_Seen="N/A", Meaning="No logs matched the selected application, time and filters. Verify the index, sourcetype, project, time range and filters before making a health decision." | fields - count ]

html.div: Start here during an incident: the newest actionable error logs are shown first. Read the error message, then click its row to focus the entire dashboard on that application and pod. Use Pod Log Explorer for the INFO/WARN context immediately before and after the failure; use Open in Search when the complete raw event is longer than the displayed 500-character excerpt.

table.title: Immediate Error Triage — Latest Actionable Error Logs (Most Recent First)

search.query: | where (http_status!="200" AND http_status!="201" AND http_status!="N/A") OR (event_category!="Normal" AND event_category!="Warning") | eval Priority=case(tonumber(http_status)>=500 OR in(event_category,"Pod / Platform Error","Database Error","Connection Error"),"P1 - CRITICAL",http_status="401" OR http_status="403" OR in(event_category,"Transaction Rollback","Batch Failure","Timeout","Authentication Error","Messaging / Deserialization Error"),"P2 - HIGH",true(),"P3 - MEDIUM") | eval Priority_Rank=case(Priority="P1 - CRITICAL",1,Priority="P2 - HIGH",2,true(),3) | eval Event_Time=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%3N") | eval Error_Log=replace(log_text,"[\r\n\t]+"," ") | eval Error_Log=replace(Error_Log,"\s+"," ") | eval Error_Log=if(len(Error_Log)>500,substr(Error_Log,1,500)." ...",Error_Log) | sort 0 - _time Priority_Rank | head 15 | fields Priority Event_Time datacenter application pod event_category http_status http_method endpoint correlation_id Error_Log

format.colorPalette: {"REST API Error":"#DC4E41","Database Error":"#DC4E41","Batch Failure":"#F1813F","Transaction Rollback":"#F1813F","Timeout":"#F8BE34","Authentication Error":"#F8BE34","Pod / Platform Error":"#DC4E41","Connection Error":"#DC4E41","Messaging / Deserialization Error":"#DC4E41","Application Error":"#F8BE34"}

single.title: Total Application Events — Click for Logs

search.query: | stats sum(Events) AS count
| stats sum(Error_Events) AS count
| stats sum(HTTP_Success) AS Success sum(HTTP_Events) AS Requests | eval value=if(Requests=0,0,round((Success/Requests)*100,2)) | fields value

single.title: All HTTP 4xx Errors — Click for Logs

search.query: | stats sum(HTTP_4xx) AS count | eval count=coalesce(count,0)

single.title: All HTTP 5xx Errors — Click for Logs

search.query: | stats sum(HTTP_5xx) AS count | eval count=coalesce(count,0)
| stats sum(Rollback_Errors) AS count

html.h2: Operational HTTP Error KPIs — HTTP 200 and 201 Are Success Codes and Are Not Included
html.p: Click any error-code KPI to open only the matching events and raw log evidence. The cards cover the response codes most commonly used by Application Support for rapid triage.

search.query: | stats sum(eval(if(http_status="400",HTTP_Events,0))) AS count | eval count=coalesce(count,0)
| stats sum(eval(if(http_status="401",HTTP_Events,0))) AS count | eval count=coalesce(count,0)

drilldown.set: HTTP 401 — Unauthorized / Token or Credential Failure

search.query: | stats sum(eval(if(http_status="403",HTTP_Events,0))) AS count | eval count=coalesce(count,0)
| stats sum(eval(if(http_status="404",HTTP_Events,0))) AS count | eval count=coalesce(count,0)
| stats sum(eval(if(http_status="409",HTTP_Events,0))) AS count | eval count=coalesce(count,0)

drilldown.set: HTTP 409 — Conflict / Duplicate or State Conflict

search.query: | stats sum(eval(if(http_status="429",HTTP_Events,0))) AS count | eval count=coalesce(count,0)

drilldown.set: HTTP 429 — Too Many Requests / Rate Limit

search.query: | stats sum(eval(if(http_status="500",HTTP_Events,0))) AS count | eval count=coalesce(count,0)
| stats sum(eval(if(http_status="502",HTTP_Events,0))) AS count | eval count=coalesce(count,0)
| stats sum(eval(if(http_status="503",HTTP_Events,0))) AS count | eval count=coalesce(count,0)
| stats sum(eval(if(http_status="504",HTTP_Events,0))) AS count | eval count=coalesce(count,0)

html.p: Click-to-investigate: click any KPI above or any row in the HTTP response-code summary below. This evidence panel changes to the selected condition and displays the matching log events. Click an evidence row to focus its application and pod, then jump directly to the complete pod-log context.

search.query: | eval focus_mode=$focus_mode|s$, focus_http_status=$focus_http_status|s$, focus_category=$focus_category|s$ | where focus_mode="all_events" OR (focus_mode="all_errors" AND ((http_status!="200" AND http_status!="201" AND http_status!="N/A") OR (event_category!="Normal" AND event_category!="Warning"))) OR (focus_mode="http_success" AND tonumber(http_status)>=200 AND tonumber(http_status)<300) OR (focus_mode="http_status" AND http_status=focus_http_status) OR (focus_mode="http_family" AND substr(http_status,1,1)=focus_http_status) OR (focus_mode="rest_api" AND (tonumber(http_status)>=400 OR event_category="REST API Error")) OR (focus_mode="category" AND event_category=focus_category) | eval Finding=case(tonumber(http_status)>=500 OR in(event_category,"Pod / Platform Error","Database Error","Connection Error"),"P1 - CRITICAL",http_status="401" OR http_status="403" OR in(event_category,"Transaction Rollback","Batch Failure","Timeout","Authentication Error","Messaging / Deserialization Error"),"P2 - HIGH",tonumber(http_status)>=400 OR event_category="Application Error" OR event_category="REST API Error","P3 - MEDIUM",tonumber(http_status)>=200 AND tonumber(http_status)<300,"SUCCESS",true(),"INFO") | eval Event_Time=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%3N") | eval Log_Evidence=replace(log_text,"[\r\n\t]+"," ") | eval Log_Evidence=replace(Log_Evidence,"\s+"," ") | eval Log_Evidence=if(len(Log_Evidence)>1000,substr(Log_Evidence,1,1000)." ...",Log_Evidence) | sort 0 - _time | head 200 | fields Finding Event_Time datacenter application pod container log_level http_status event_category http_method endpoint correlation_id Log_Evidence source

format.colorPalette: {"Normal":"#53A051","Warning":"#F8BE34","REST API Error":"#DC4E41","Database Error":"#DC4E41","Batch Failure":"#F1813F","Transaction Rollback":"#F1813F","Timeout":"#F8BE34","Authentication Error":"#F8BE34","Pod / Platform Error":"#DC4E41","Connection Error":"#DC4E41","Messaging / Deserialization Error":"#DC4E41","Application Error":"#F8BE34"}

html.p: Selected-error context: click a row in Immediate Error Triage or Matching Event Evidence. The table below shows five minutes before and five minutes after that event from the same application and pod. This is the fastest place to identify the trigger, exception and recovery sequence.

table.title: $selected_incident_label$ — Five-Minute Context Before and After the Failure

search.query: | eval Selected_Epoch=strptime($incident_time|s$,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%3N") | where Selected_Epoch>0 AND abs(_time-Selected_Epoch)<=300 | eval Seconds_From_Error=round(_time-Selected_Epoch,0) | eval Context_Position=case(abs(Seconds_From_Error)<=1,"SELECTED EVENT",Seconds_From_Error<0,"BEFORE",true(),"AFTER") | eval Event_Time=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%3N") | sort 0 _time | fields Context_Position Seconds_From_Error Event_Time datacenter application pod container node log_level http_status event_category http_method endpoint correlation_id log_text source

single.title: REST / API Errors — Click for Logs

search.query: | stats sum(REST_Errors) AS count
| stats sum(DB_Errors) AS count
| stats sum(Connection_Errors) AS count
| stats sum(Timeout_Errors) AS count
| stats sum(Batch_Errors) AS count
| stats sum(Auth_Errors) AS count

table.title: Workload / VM Host Error Navigator — Click a Row to Focus the Dashboard and Logs

search.query: | stats sum(Events) AS Events sum(Error_Events) AS Errors sum(HTTP_4xx) AS HTTP_4xx sum(HTTP_5xx) AS HTTP_5xx sum(Auth_Errors) AS Authentication sum(DB_Errors) AS Database sum(Connection_Errors) AS Connection sum(Timeout_Errors) AS Timeouts sum(Batch_Errors) AS Batch sum(Rollback_Errors) AS Rollbacks max(Last_Seen) AS Last_Error by datacenter application pod | where Errors>0 | eval "Error Rate %"=round((Errors/Events)*100,2), Priority=case(HTTP_5xx>0 OR Database>0 OR Connection>0,"P1 - CRITICAL",Rollbacks>0 OR Batch>0 OR Timeouts>0,"P2 - HIGH",true(),"P3 - MEDIUM"), Priority_Rank=case(Priority="P1 - CRITICAL",1,Priority="P2 - HIGH",2,true(),3) | convert ctime(Last_Error) | sort 0 Priority_Rank - Errors | fields Priority datacenter application pod Events Errors "Error Rate %" HTTP_4xx HTTP_5xx Authentication Database Connection Timeouts Batch Rollbacks Last_Error | head 50

table.title: All HTTP Response Codes — Click Any Row to Open Its Matching Log Evidence

search.query: | where HTTP_Events>0 AND http_status!="N/A" | stats sum(HTTP_Events) AS Count dc(application) AS Applications dc(pod) AS Pods values(application) AS "Application List" min(_time) AS First_Seen max(Last_Seen) AS Last_Seen by status_family http_status | eventstats sum(Count) AS Total_HTTP_Events | eval "Percent %"=round((Count/Total_HTTP_Events)*100,2), Description=case(http_status="100","Continue",http_status="101","Switching Protocols",http_status="200","OK",http_status="201","Created",http_status="202","Accepted",http_status="204","No Content",http_status="206","Partial Content",http_status="301","Moved Permanently",http_status="302","Found",http_status="304","Not Modified",http_status="307","Temporary Redirect",http_status="308","Permanent Redirect",http_status="400","Bad Request",http_status="401","Unauthorized",http_status="403","Forbidden",http_status="404","Not Found",http_status="405","Method Not Allowed",http_status="408","Request Timeout",http_status="409","Conflict",http_status="415","Unsupported Media Type",http_status="422","Unprocessable Entity",http_status="429","Too Many Requests",http_status="500","Internal Server Error",http_status="501","Not Implemented",http_status="502","Bad Gateway",http_status="503","Service Unavailable",http_status="504","Gateway Timeout",true(),"Other HTTP Status"), Health=case(status_family="5xx","CRITICAL",status_family="4xx","WARNING",true(),"HEALTHY"), "Support Action"=case(status_family="5xx","Check application, dependency and upstream service logs; escalate recurring failures",http_status="401" OR http_status="403","Validate token, credentials, permissions and authentication dependency",http_status="429","Check throttling, rate limits and retry behavior",http_status="404" OR http_status="405","Validate endpoint route and HTTP method",status_family="4xx","Validate request payload, headers and client behavior",status_family="3xx","Validate redirect target and routing",true(),"No error action required") | eval Status_Number=tonumber(http_status) | convert ctime(First_Seen) ctime(Last_Seen) | sort 0 Status_Number | rename status_family AS Family http_status AS HTTP_Status | fields Health Family HTTP_Status Description Count "Percent %" Applications Pods "Application List" First_Seen Last_Seen "Support Action"

chart.title: HTTP Status Trend — 15-Minute Buckets Within Selected Range

search.query: | where HTTP_Events>0 | timechart span=15m sum(HTTP_Events) by http_status limit=20 useother=f

chart.title: Error Trend by Type — 15-Minute Buckets Within Selected Range

search.query: | where Error_Events>0 | timechart span=15m sum(Error_Events) by event_category limit=12 useother=f
| where HTTP_Events>0 | stats sum(HTTP_Events) AS count by http_status | sort 0 - count
| where Error_Events>0 | stats sum(Error_Events) AS count by event_category | sort 0 - count
| where Error_Events>0 | eval Hour=strftime(_time,"%H:00") | stats sum(Error_Events) AS count by Hour | sort Hour

chart.title: HTTP 503 Trend — 15-Minute Buckets Within Selected Range

search.query: | timechart span=15m sum(eval(if(http_status="503",HTTP_Events,0))) AS "HTTP 503" | fillnull value=0

chart.title: HTTP 401 Trend — 15-Minute Buckets Within Selected Range

search.query: | timechart span=15m sum(eval(if(http_status="401",HTTP_Events,0))) AS "HTTP 401" | fillnull value=0

chart.title: Transaction Rollback Trend — 15-Minute Buckets Within Selected Range

search.query: | timechart span=15m sum(Rollback_Errors) AS Rollbacks | fillnull value=0

html.p: Log investigation: HTTP Non-200/201 Log Explorer contains every captured HTTP response code except 200 and 201. Pod / Host Log Explorer shows surrounding log levels; Detailed Error Events shows actionable application failures. Use the horizontal scroll bar at the bottom of each table to inspect every field.

Export logs: move the pointer over the upper-right corner of a log table and click the download/export control, then select CSV. The dashboard export contains its retained, filtered evidence. For a complete uncapped export, use Open in Search and then select Export > CSV.

table.title: HTTP Non-200/201 Log Explorer — Every Captured Response Code Except 200 and 201

search.query: | where http_status!="N/A" AND http_status!="200" AND http_status!="201" | eval Priority=case(tonumber(http_status)>=500,"P1 - CRITICAL",http_status="401" OR http_status="403" OR http_status="429","P2 - HIGH",true(),"P3 - MEDIUM") | eval Support_Meaning=case(http_status="400","Bad request or invalid payload",http_status="401","Unauthorized, token expired or invalid credentials",http_status="403","Permission or authorization failure",http_status="404","Endpoint or route not found",http_status="409","Duplicate record or state conflict",http_status="429","API rate limit reached",http_status="500","Application or unhandled server error",http_status="502","Gateway, load balancer or upstream failure",http_status="503","Service or dependency unavailable",http_status="504","Gateway or backend timeout",true(),"HTTP error") | eval Suggested_Check=case(http_status="400","Validate payload, headers and required fields",http_status="401","Validate or refresh token and credentials",http_status="403","Validate roles, permissions and access policy",http_status="404","Validate endpoint, route and deployment version",http_status="409","Validate duplicate data, idempotency and current state",http_status="429","Check rate limits, throttling and retry behavior",http_status="500","Inspect stack trace and application exception",http_status="502","Check ingress, load balancer and upstream dependency",http_status="503","Check service availability, dependency health and deployment",http_status="504","Check backend latency, timeout settings and dependency response",true(),"Inspect application log evidence") | eval Event_Time=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%3N") | sort 0 - _time | table Priority Event_Time datacenter application pod container node log_level http_status Support_Meaning Suggested_Check event_category http_method endpoint correlation_id log_text source

table.title: Pod / VM Host Log Explorer — Redacted All-Level Context, Correlation IDs and CSV Export

search.query: | table _time datacenter application pod container node log_level http_status event_category http_method endpoint correlation_id log_text source | sort 0 - _time

format.colorPalette: {"Normal":"#53A051","Warning":"#F8BE34","REST API Error":"#DC4E41","Database Error":"#DC4E41","Batch Failure":"#F1813F","Transaction Rollback":"#F1813F","Timeout":"#F8BE34","Authentication Error":"#F8BE34","Pod / Platform Error":"#DC4E41","Connection Error":"#DC4E41","Messaging / Deserialization Error":"#DC4E41","Application Error":"#F8BE34"}

table.title: Detailed Error Events — Redacted Evidence, Correlation IDs and CSV Export

search.query: | where (http_status!="200" AND http_status!="201" AND http_status!="N/A") OR (event_category!="Normal" AND event_category!="Warning") | table _time datacenter application pod container node log_level http_status event_category http_method endpoint correlation_id log_text source | sort 0 - _time

format.colorPalette: {"REST API Error":"#DC4E41","Database Error":"#DC4E41","Batch Failure":"#F1813F","Transaction Rollback":"#F1813F","Timeout":"#F8BE34","Authentication Error":"#F8BE34","Pod / Platform Error":"#DC4E41","Connection Error":"#DC4E41","Messaging / Deserialization Error":"#DC4E41","Application Error":"#F8BE34"}

search.query: | where http_status="401" | table _time datacenter application pod endpoint http_method correlation_id log_text source | sort 0 - _time | appendpipe [ stats count | where count=0 | eval log_text="No HTTP 401 events matched the selected application, time range and filters." | fields log_text ]

| where http_status="503" | table _time datacenter application pod endpoint http_method correlation_id log_text source | sort 0 - _time | appendpipe [ stats count | where count=0 | eval log_text="No HTTP 503 events matched the selected application, time range and filters." | fields log_text ]

| where event_category="Transaction Rollback" OR event_category="Batch Failure" OR event_category="Database Error" | table _time datacenter application pod event_category correlation_id log_text source | sort 0 - _time | appendpipe [ stats count | where count=0 | eval log_text="No rollback, batch-failure or database-error events matched the selected application, time range and filters." | fields log_text ]

html.h2: Application Support Pod Triage, Resolution and Dev Handoff

ul.li: 1 — Confirm: verify the selected scope and Log Freshness. Do not declare the application healthy when logs are delayed or stale.
2 — Understand: read What Is Wrong Now? and Is the Incident Getting Better or Worse? for impact, direction and the first recommended check.
3 — Investigate: click a latest-error or evidence row. Review the BEFORE, SELECTED EVENT and AFTER records in the five-minute context window.
4 — Correlate: follow correlation/request IDs across pods and compare timestamps with deployments, maintenance, dependencies and Autosys execution.
5 — Resolve: take support-owned recovery action only when the cause and approved runbook are confirmed. Verify recovery by checking the AFTER logs and incident direction.
6 — Escalate: send Dev the impact, application, pod, data center, first/last occurrence, response code, endpoint, correlation ID, representative stack trace and attempted support action.
7 — Export safely: download the filtered CSV evidence. Tokens, passwords, secrets and API keys are masked by the dashboard searches.
Performance: use 30 minutes for routine monitoring; for longer ranges, filter to the application and pod before submitting.
